'''dhashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fulgurantly|fulgurantly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fulgurantly|fulgurantly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhashate|dhashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhashatesher|dhashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashatesherĂ«m|dhashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhashatero|dhashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhashateshĂ«|dhashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashateshĂ«m|dhashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhashatero|gokidhashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhashateshĂ«|gokidhashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashateshĂ«m|gokidhashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhashankerom|godhashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhashankeshĂ«|godhashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashankeshĂ«m|godhashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhashankeya|godhashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhashaterom|dhashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashatemu|dhashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhashateya|dhashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhashaterom|gokidhashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashatemu|gokidhashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhashateya|gokidhashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhashashate|dhashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhashashatesher|dhashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashashatesherĂ«m|dhashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhashashatero|dhashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhashashateshĂ«|dhashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashashateshĂ«m|dhashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhashashatero|gokidhashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhashashateshĂ«|gokidhashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashashateshĂ«m|gokidhashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhashashankerom|godhashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhashashankeshĂ«|godhashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashashankeshĂ«m|godhashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhashashankeya|godhashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhashashaterom|dhashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashashatemu|dhashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhashashateya|dhashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhashashaterom|gokidhashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashashatemu|gokidhashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhashashateya|gokidhashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠte|dhĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠtesher|dhĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠtero|dhĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠshĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠshĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠshĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠterom|dhĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠtemu|dhĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠshĂŠteya|dhĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠshĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠshĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafshafte|dhafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafshaftesher|dhafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafshaftesherĂ«m|dhafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafshaftero|dhafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafshafteshĂ«|dhafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafshafteshĂ«m|dhafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafshaftero|gokidhafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafshafteshĂ«|gokidhafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafshafteshĂ«m|gokidhafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafshafnkerom|godhafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafshafnkeshĂ«|godhafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafshafnkeshĂ«m|godhafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafshafnkeya|godhafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafshafterom|dhafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafshaftemu|dhafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafshafteya|dhafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafshafterom|gokidhafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafshaftemu|gokidhafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafshafteya|gokidhafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
